name: Gary Rhodes Gypsy Tart
recipeInstructions:
1 Pre heat oven to 200°C/400°F/gas 6.
2 Whisk the evaporated milk and sugar together for 10 - 15 minutes until light and fluffy. The mixture should be coffee colored.
3 Pour the mixture into the pastry case.
4 Bake in the oven for 10 minutes.
5 The gypsy tart will have a slightly sticky surface but will not be set completely until it has been left to cool.
6 Serve cold.
